title: Ligeophila bicornuta
intro: Ligeophila bicornuta is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Ligeophila bicornuta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ligeophila bicornuta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions and provide relief from pain and inflammation.
